subject: Refactor the ProvMnS code in a separate module for maintainability
commit_message:
Refactor the ProvMnS code in a separate module for maintainability

- Add provmns-api module with pre-built JAR (3GPP TS28532 v18.6.0) merged with
  hand-written sources at build time; code generation is opt-in via profile
- Remove ProvMnS model generation and hand-written classes from cps-ncmp-service;
  update imports, JaCoCo excludes, and architecture test allowed packages

Issue-ID: CPS-2902
Change-Id: I88f7fa940758953c2b974454f135a42d270382ac
Signed-off-by: shikha0203 <shivani.khare@est.tech>
